one_line_intro: 호텔의 AI 검색 노출을 모니터링하고 직접 예약 전환을 최적화하는 SaaS 플랫폼

translated_fields.product_desc: Rebean은 ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity와 같은 AI 검색 엔진에서 호텔이 어떻게 노출되는지 모니터링하고 최적화하는 호스피탈리티 전용 AI 가시성 및 수익 플랫폼입니다. AI 인용을 직접 예약으로 전환합니다. 일회성 감사 보고서를 지속적인 AI 기반 인사이트와 실행으로 대체하는, 호텔팀을 위해 특별히 설계된 최초의 일일 수익 플랫폼입니다.
translated_fields.team_background: Duy Nguyen (창업자 겸 CEO): 호스피탈리티 기술 분야 16년 이상 경력, 전 세계 2,000개 이상의 호텔을 위한 엔터프라이즈 플랫폼 구축, GauVendi에서 AI 기반 재고 및 유통 관리 리드(2020-2024), IHG AMEA 비즈니스 관계 관리자로 아시아태평양 전역 담당 경력 보유. James Young (고문, Sparren Consulting): IHG 고위 리더십으로 9개국 경험, 유럽·중동·동남아·오세아니아에서 다중 호텔 운영자 역할 수행, 베트남 시장 고문 및 대학 강사. 소규모 엔지니어링 팀과 6개 시장에 걸친 호텔 컨설팅 네트워크의 지원을 받고 있습니다.
translated_fields.traction: 유료 고객 2개 (연간 계약 체결), 계약 대기 2건 ($1,980 + $5,220/년), 다낭 및 호이안에서 참여 호텔 15개 (100% 관심률), 주요 고객: Tonys Villa (+30% AI 가시성, +20% 인용률, 30일 내 직접 방문 15배 증가), Vera Italia (7일 내 AI 신뢰 출처 인정), Reverie Saigon, 주요 파트너: OnePay.vn — 베트남 내 300개 호텔 포트폴리오를 보유한 공동판매 파이프라인 구축
translated_fields.traction_awards: 공식 수상 이력 없음 (2024년 설립 초기 단계). 주목할 만한 입증 사례: Tonys Villa 케이스 스터디 - Rebean 사용 30일 내 AI 가시성 +30%, 인용률 +20%, 직접 방문 15배 증가. Vera Italia - 7일 내 AI 신뢰 출처로 인정. 호스피탈리티 AI 가시성 분야 퍼스트무버 포지셔닝 - 직접 경쟁 네이티브 솔루션 부재.
translated_fields.poc_idea: 베트남 롯데호텔 1-2개 지점(하노이 또는 사이공)에서 3개월간 AI 가시성 및 직접 수익 PoC를 제안합니다. Rebean이 제공하는 것: ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot, Claude를 통해 주요 고객 페르소나(비즈니스 여행자, 럭셔리 레저, 한국 여행자, 동남아 시장)에 대해 롯데호텔 지점들이 어떻게 노출되는지 매일 모니터링합니다. 어떤 AI 인용이 롯데의 직접 예약 채널로 트래픽을 유도하는지, OTA로 유출되는지 추적하고, 해당 유출의 수수료 비용을 정량화하며, AI 콘텐츠 격차를 해결하고 AI 여행 추천에서 롯데의 입지를 강화하기 위한 우선순위 실행 계획을 제공합니다. 롯데가 제공하는 것: 1-2개 지점 마케팅 관리자 접근 권한, 귀속 검증을 위한 기본 예약 채널 데이터(직접 대 OTA 비율), 롯데 베트남 호텔 디지털 마케팅팀 소개. PoC가 효과적인 이유: Rebean은 첫 단계에서 깊은 IT 통합이 필요 없는 외부 모니터링 레이어로 작동하므로 배포가 빠르고 위험이 낮습니다. 3개월차까지 양측은 측정 가능한 AI 가시성 향상, 정량화된 OTA 유출 식별, 추적 가능한 직접 채널 영향을 보여주는 공동 발표 가능한 결과를 확보하게 되며, 이는 동남아시아 전역 롯데 호텔 포트폴리오에 적용 가능한 재현 가능한 템플릿이 됩니다.
translated_fields.esg_impact: 사회적 가치: OTA 플랫폼은 호텔에 예약당 15-25%의 수수료를 부과합니다. 베트남 관광 경제의 중추를 이루는 독립 및 가족 운영 호텔의 경우, 이는 마진을 직접 압박하고 직원 및 지역 사회에 대한 재투자를 제한합니다. Rebean은 AI 검색에서 호텔 가시성을 최적화하여 더 많은 직접 예약을 유도함으로써 수수료 수익을 호텔에 유지시킵니다. 롯데 베트남 지점과의 PoC는 이러한 영향을 기업 규모에서 정량화할 수 있게 합니다. 거버넌스: 현재 호텔들은 AI가 수백만 명의 여행자에게 자신들에 대해 무엇을 말하는지 전혀 알 수 없습니다. ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity는 호텔이 볼 수도, 수정할 수도, 통제할 수도 없는 정보를 기반으로 호텔을 적극적으로 추천합니다. Rebean은 이러한 격차를 메우는 일일 모니터링 및 감사 레이어를 제공합니다. 확립된 ESG 보고 기준을 갖춘 그룹인 롯데와의 협력은 동남아시아 호스피탈리티 분야에서 책임 있는 AI 브랜드 거버넌스를 위한 초기 산업 규범 설정에 도움이 될 것입니다.

raw_data.product_desc: Rebean is a hospitality-native AI visibility and revenue platform that monitors and optimizes how hotels appear across AI search engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity — turning AI citations into direct bookings. It is the first daily revenue platform purpose-built for hotel teams, replacing one-time audit reports with continuous AI-driven insight and action.
raw_data.team_background:
Duy Nguyen (Founder & CEO): 16+ years in hospitality tech; built enterprise platforms for 2,000+ hotels globally; led AI-powered inventory & distribution at GauVendi (2020–2024); former IHG AMEA Business Relationship Manager across Asia-Pacific.
James Young (Advisor, Sparren Consulting): IHG senior leadership across 9 countries; multi-unit operator in Europe, ME, SEA & Australasia; Vietnam market advisor and university lecturer.
Supported by a lean engineering team and a hotel consulting network across 6 markets.
raw_data.traction:
2 paying customers (live on annual contracts)
2 contracts pending ($1,980 + $5,220/yr)
15 hotels engaged in Da Nang & Hoi An (100% interest rate)
Key clients: Tonys Villa (+30% AI visibility, +20% citation rate, 15× direct visits in 30 days), Vera Italia (AI trusted source in 7 days), Reverie Saigon
Key partner: OnePay.vn — co-sell pipeline reaching a 300-hotel portfolio in Vietnam
raw_data.traction_awards:
No formal awards to date (early-stage, founded 2024). Notable proof points include:
Tonys Villa case study: +30% AI visibility, +20% citation rate, 15× direct visits within 30 days of using Rebean
Vera Italia: recognized as an AI-trusted source within 7 days
First-mover positioning in hospitality AI visibility — no direct native competitor exists
raw_data.valuation: $2,000,000 USD (SAFE valuation cap, Angel Round — May 2026)
raw_data.motivation: Joint commercialization linkage with LOTTE Group affiliates
raw_data.lotte_area: Hospitality/Hotel/Tourism(LOTTE Hotel, LOTTE Properties, LOTTE Cinema, LOTTE World, etc.)
raw_data.poc_idea:
We propose a 3-month AI Visibility and Direct Revenue PoC across 1-2 Lotte Hotel properties in Vietnam (Hanoi or Saigon).

What Rebean delivers:
Rebean will monitor daily how Lotte Hotel properties appear across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot, and Claude for key guest personas (business traveller, luxury leisure, Korean traveller, Southeast Asian market). We will track which AI citations drive traffic to Lotte's direct booking channel versus leaking to OTAs, quantify the commission cost of that leakage, and deliver a prioritised action plan to fix AI content gaps and strengthen Lotte's position in AI travel recommendations.

What Lotte provides:
Access to 1-2 property marketing managers, basic booking channel data (direct vs OTA split) to validate attribution, and introductions to Lotte's Vietnam hotel digital marketing teams.

Why this works as a PoC:
Rebean operates as an external monitoring layer with no deep IT integration required in the first phase, making deployment fast and low-risk. By Month 3, both parties will have a jointly publishable result showing measurable AI visibility uplift, quantified OTA leakage identified, and trackable direct channel impact — a replicable template for the broader Lotte hotel portfolio across Southeast Asia.
raw_data.esg_impact:
Social
OTA platforms charge hotels 15–25% commission per booking. For independent and family-owned hotels that form the backbone of Vietnam's tourism economy, this directly compresses margins and limits reinvestment into staff and local communities. Rebean drives more direct bookings by optimising hotel visibility in AI search, keeping commission revenue with the hotel. A PoC with Lotte's Vietnam properties would make this impact quantifiable at enterprise scale.

Governance
Hotels currently have no visibility into what AI tells millions of travellers about them. ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity actively recommend hotels based on information the hotel cannot see, correct, or control. Rebean provides the daily monitoring and audit layer that closes this gap. A collaboration with Lotte, a group with established ESG reporting standards, would help set an early industry norm for responsible AI brand governance in Southeast Asian hospitality.

one_line_intro: 익명 방문자의 행동 신호를 50ms 이내에 분석하여 실시간 개인화를 제공하는 B2B API

translated_fields.product_desc: PULSE (Personalization Understanding Layer for Signals and Engagement)는 디지털 제공업체가 사용자 경험을 실시간으로 개인화할 수 있도록 하는 멀티 테넌트 B2B SaaS 플랫폼입니다. 쿠키나 영구 기록에 의존하지 않고 수동적 및 능동적 행동 신호인 '디지털 바디 랭귀지'를 분석하여 50ms 이내에 관련 콘텐츠, 제품 또는 작업을 제공합니다.
translated_fields.team_background:
1. 깊은 기술 아키텍처 및 확장성
팀은 고동시성 분산 시스템 구축에 20년 이상의 경험을 보유하고 있습니다.

인프라 숙련도: 저지연 언어(Rust) 및 최신 클라우드 네이티브 스택(NestJS, Python, AWS)에 대한 전문 지식을 통해 EchoGraph™ 엔진이 성능 저하 없이 10,000개 이상의 동시 요청을 처리할 수 있도록 합니다.

AI/ML 전문성: 실시간 Bayesian 추론 및 행동 매핑을 구현하는 검증된 능력으로 정적 규칙 기반 시스템을 넘어 동적 인텐트 예측으로 나아갑니다.

2. 광고 기술 및 개인화 분야 도메인 전문성
리더십은 업계 거물급 기업에서 고위직을 역임하며 글로벌 커머스가 어떻게 작동하는지에 대한 '무대 뒤' 이해를 가지고 있습니다.

시장 통찰력: '콜드 스타트' 문제와 Criteo, Cox Automotive와 같은 레거시 제공업체의 기술적 한계에 대한 깊은 지식.

개인정보 보호 우선 혁신: GDPR, 베트남의 법률 134/2025/QH15 등 변화하는 규제 환경에 대한 정교한 이해로 제품 핵심에 '설계에 의한 규정 준수'를 구축할 수 있습니다.

3. 전략적 실행 및 린 운영
Pre-seed 팀으로서 120일 이내에 개념에서 프로덕션 준비 인프라로 이동하는 능력을 입증했습니다.

자본 효율성: AWS Activate 크레딧 $24,000를 성공적으로 확보하고 최소한의 오버헤드로 특허 출원 중인 IP 프로세스(USPTO)를 관리했습니다.

애자일 제품 관리: MVP 범위를 정의하고 제품-시장 적합성을 신속하게 검증하기 위한 신속한 파일럿 배포(2026년 4월 5개 파일럿 출시) 관리에 대한 숙련도.

4. 지역 리더십 및 인재 확보
베트남 및 동남아시아 기술 생태계에 깊은 뿌리를 둔 팀은 확장에 고유한 위치에 있습니다.

기술 채용: 아시아의 떠오르는 기술 우수성 중심지인 다낭에서 고성능, 비용 효율적인 엔지니어링 허브를 구축하기 위해 방대한 네트워크를 활용하는 능력.

전략적 파트너십: 현재 자금 조달 모멘텀을 주도하기 위해 지역 액셀러레이터(Antler) 및 투자 네트워크(AngelCentral)와 확립된 관계.
translated_fields.lotte_area: 유통/커머스(롯데백화점, 롯데몰, 롯데마트 등), 호텔/관광(롯데호텔, 롯데프로퍼티, 롯데시네마, 롯데월드 등), AI/IT(롯데이노베이트)
translated_fields.poc_idea:
프로젝트 제목: '즉각 인텐트' 리테일 엔진
기간: 4~6개월
대상 계열사: 롯데마트(하이퍼마켓), 롯데백화점, 롯데시네마

1. 핵심 목표
롯데의 디지털 접점(롯데마트 앱, 웹 스토어프론트)에 PulseAPI를 배포하여 익명이거나 로그인하지 않은 방문자 70% 이상에 대한 '콜드 스타트' 문제를 해결하는 것이 목표입니다. EchoGraph™ 엔진을 사용하여 첫 클릭부터 쇼핑 여정을 초개인화하여 쿠키나 개인정보를 사용하지 않고 평균 장바구니 크기를 15~20% 증가시키는 것을 목표로 합니다.

2. 롯데 인프라 및 리소스의 전략적 활용
인프라(롯데이노베이트): Rust 기반 SDK를 롯데이노베이트의 API 게이트웨이와 통합합니다. 이를 통해 PulseAPI의 50ms 이하 추론 엔진과 롯데의 기존 ERP 및 CRM 시스템 간의 원활하고 고도의 보안 브리지를 보장합니다.

데이터 신호(옴니채널 리테일): 롯데마트의 웹 및 모바일 플랫폼(스크롤 패턴, 카테고리 탐색, 검색 속도)의 익명화된 행동 데이터를 활용하여 베트남 소비자에게 맞춤화된 로컬 심리 그래픽 모델을 훈련합니다.

고객 접점(롯데시네마 및 마트): 롯데시네마 예약 플랫폼에서 익명 사용자를 위한 '즉각 영화 추천'을 제공하고 롯데마트 앱에서 '예측 식료품 번들'을 제공하기 위해 병렬 A/B 테스트를 실행합니다.

3. 구현 로드맵(6개월)
1~2개월(통합): 롯데이노베이트를 통한 경량 PulseAPI SDK 배포. 롯데 리테일 카테고리에 고유한 '디지털 바디 랭귀지' 매핑.

3~4개월(파일럿 단계): 롯데마트 하노이 웨스트레이크점과 롯데시네마 트래픽의 10%에 대해 라이브 A/B 테스트. 롯데의 클라우드 예산에 비용을 추가하지 않고 추론을 처리하기 위해 AWS Activate 크레딧(보조 컴퓨팅)을 사용합니다.

5~6개월(최적화 및 확장): 롯데 경영진을 위한 '개인정보 보호 우선' 대시보드를 마무리하고 베트남 법률 134/2025/QH15 준수를 입증하며 동남아시아 지역 전체로 전면 확대를 준비합니다.

4. 원하는 협력 결과
기술 검증: PulseAPI가 롯데의 높은 트래픽 환경 내에서 50ms 이하의 레이턴시를 유지할 수 있음을 입증합니다.

상업적 성장: 롯데가 2026년에 공격적으로 타겟팅하는 '신성인' 및 'Z세대' 인구 통계에 대해 특히 전환율 및 장바구니 크기의 측정 가능한 향상을 달성합니다.

향후 투자: PoC에서 롯데벤처스 베트남이 주도하는 전략적 투자 라운드로 전환하여 PulseAPI를 롯데의 글로벌 시장(인도네시아 및 한국)으로 확장합니다.
translated_fields.esg_impact:
1. 거버넌스(G): 윤리 우선 데이터 주권
문제: 표준 개인화는 침습적 추적에 의존하여 베트남의 AI법(134/2025/QH15) 및 개인정보 보호법(PIPL)에 따라 큰 위험을 초래합니다.

PulseAPI 임팩트: '제로 개인정보' 아키텍처는 이름, 이메일 및 영구 기록 수집을 제거합니다. 신원 없이 인텐트를 매핑함으로써 롯데의 규정 준수 위험과 데이터 유출에 대한 책임을 줄입니다. 이는 2026년의 핵심 거버넌스 우선순위입니다.

롯데 PoC 시너지: 롯데와의 협력을 통해 베트남에서 윤리적 AI의 골드 스탠다드를 확립할 수 있으며, 고전환 리테일이 소비자 개인정보 보호의 희생을 필요로 하지 않음을 입증합니다.

2. 사회(S): 소비자 자율성 및 포용성 향상
문제: 전통적인 AI는 종종 과거 인구통계 데이터를 기반으로 '필터 버블'을 생성하여 배제 또는 차별적 가격 책정으로 이어질 수 있습니다.

PulseAPI 임팩트: 과거 신원이 아닌 현재 인텐트에 초점을 맞춤으로써 PulseAPI는 쇼핑 경험을 민주화합니다. 디지털 기록이 없는 처음 방문하는 익명의 또는 저소득 사용자를 포함한 모든 방문자를 동일한 수준의 고품질 서비스로 대우합니다.

롯데 PoC 시너지: 롯데마트와 시네마 내에서 PoC는 '즉각 포용'에 초점을 맞춰 신규 고객이 개인 데이터를 제공하지 않고도 개인화된 여정을 통해 즉각적인 '사회적 가치'를 느낄 수 있도록 합니다.

3. 환경(E): 에너지 효율적 추론
문제: 무거운 AI 모델은 데이터 센터 에너지 소비에 크게 기여하며, 이는 2040년 탄소 중립을 목표로 하는 소매업체에게 증가하는 우려 사항입니다.

PulseAPI 임팩트: 엔진은 극도의 메모리 안전성과 높은 에너지 효율성으로 알려진 언어인 Rust로 구축되었습니다. 50ms 이하의 추론은 레거시 Python 기반 모델에 비해 요청당 훨씬 적은 컴퓨팅 성능을 사용합니다.

롯데 PoC 시너지: AWS Activate 크레딧을 활용하여 에너지 최적화 클라우드 인스턴스에서 PoC를 실행합니다. 이를 통해 롯데는 Scope 3 탄소 배출량의 비례적 증가 없이 AI 역량을 확장할 수 있습니다.

raw_data.product_desc: PULSE (Personalization Understanding Layer for Signals and Engagement) is a multi-tenant B2B SaaS platform that enables digital providers to personalize user experiences in real-time. By analyzing "digital body language"—passive and active behavioral signals—PULSE delivers relevant content, products, or actions in under 50ms without relying on cookies or persistent history.
raw_data.team_background:
1. Deep Technical Architecture & Scalability
The team possesses over 20 years of experience in building high-concurrency, distributed systems.

Infrastructure Mastery: Expertise in low-latency languages (Rust) and modern cloud-native stacks (NestJS, Python, AWS) to ensure the EchoGraph™ engine can handle 10,000+ concurrent requests without performance degradation.

AI/ML Specialization: Proven ability to implement real-time Bayesian inference and behavioral mapping, moving beyond static rule-based systems to dynamic intent prediction.

2. Domain Expertise in Ad-Tech & Personalization
The leadership brings a "backstage" understanding of how global commerce works, having held senior roles at industry giants.

Market Insight: Deep knowledge of the "Cold Start" problem and the technical limitations of legacy providers like Criteo and Cox Automotive.

Privacy-First Innovation: A sophisticated understanding of the shifting regulatory landscape (GDPR, Vietnam’s Law No. 134/2025/QH15), allowing the team to build "compliance-by-design" into the product core.

3. Strategic Execution & Lean Operations
As a pre-seed team, we have demonstrated the ability to move from concept to production-ready infrastructure in under 120 days.

Capital Efficiency: Successfully secured $24,000 in AWS Activate credits and managed the patent-pending IP process (USPTO) with minimal overhead.

Agile Product Management: Mastery in defining MVP scope and managing rapid pilot deployments (5 pilots launching April 2026) to validate product-market fit quickly.

4. Regional Leadership & Talent Acquisition
With deep roots in the Vietnam and Southeast Asian tech ecosystems, the team is uniquely positioned to scale.

Technical Recruitment: Ability to leverage a vast network to build a high-performance, cost-effective engineering hub in Da Nang, a rising center for technical excellence in Asia.

Strategic Partnerships: Established relationships with regional accelerators (Antler) and investment networks (AngelCentral) to drive the current fundraising momentum.

raw_data.poc_idea:
Project Title: The "Instant Intent" Retail Engine
Duration: 4–6 Months
Target Affiliates: LOTTE Mart (Hypermarkets), LOTTE Department Store, and LOTTE Cinema.

1. Core Objective
The objective is to deploy PulseAPI across LOTTE’s digital touchpoints (Lotte Mart App, Web Storefronts) to solve the "Cold Start" problem for the 70%+ of visitors who are anonymous or not logged in. We will use our EchoGraph™ engine to hyper-personalize the shopping journey from the first click, driving a target 15–20% increase in average basket size without using cookies or PII.

2. Strategic Use of LOTTE Infrastructure & Resources
Infrastructure (LOTTE Innovate): We will integrate our Rust-based SDK with LOTTE Innovate’s API Gateway. This ensures a seamless, high-security bridge between PulseAPI’s sub-50ms inference engine and LOTTE’s existing ERP and CRM systems.

Data Signals (Omnichannel Retail): We will utilize anonymized behavioral data from Lotte Mart’s web and mobile platforms (scroll patterns, category browsing, search velocity) to train local psychographic models tailored to Vietnamese consumers.

Customer Touchpoints (LOTTE Cinema & Mart): We will run parallel A/B tests on the LOTTE Cinema booking platform to provide "Instant Movie Recommendations" for anonymous users, and on the Lotte Mart app for "Predictive Grocery Bundles".

3. Implementation Roadmap (6 Months)
Month 1-2 (Integration): Deployment of the lightweight PulseAPI SDK via LOTTE Innovate. Mapping the "digital body language" unique to LOTTE's retail categories.

Month 3-4 (Pilot Phase): Live A/B testing on 10% of traffic for Lotte Mart West Lake Hanoi and LOTTE Cinema. Use our AWS Activate credits (subsidized compute) to process inference without adding cost to LOTTE’s cloud budget.

Month 5-6 (Optimization & Scaling): Finalizing the "Privacy-First" dashboard for LOTTE management, proving compliance with Vietnam Law No. 134/2025/QH15, and preparing for full-scale rollout across the SEA region.

4. Desired Collaboration Outcome
Technical Validation: Demonstrating that PulseAPI can maintain sub-50ms latency within LOTTE’s high-traffic environment.

Commercial Growth: Achieving a measurable lift in conversion rates and basket size, particularly for the "New Adult" and "Gen-Z" demographics LOTTE is aggressively targeting in 2026.

Future Investment: Transitioning from PoC to a strategic investment round led by LOTTE Ventures Vietnam to scale PulseAPI into LOTTE’s global markets (Indonesia and Korea).
raw_data.esg_impact:
1. Governance (G): Ethics-First Data Sovereignty
The Problem: Standard personalization relies on intrusive tracking, posing a major risk under Vietnam’s Law No. 134/2025/QH15 (Law on AI) and the Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL).

PulseAPI Impact: Our "Zero-PII" architecture eliminates the collection of names, emails, and persistent history. By mapping intent without identity, we reduce LOTTE’s compliance risk and liability for data breaches—a core governance priority for 2026.

LOTTE PoC Synergy: Collaboration with LOTTE would allow us to establish a Gold Standard for Ethical AI in Vietnam, proving that high-conversion retail does not require the sacrifice of consumer privacy.

2. Social (S): Enhancing Consumer Autonomy & Inclusion
The Problem: Traditional AI often creates "filter bubbles" based on historical demographic data, which can lead to exclusion or discriminatory pricing.

PulseAPI Impact: By focusing on current intent rather than past identity, PulseAPI democratizes the shopping experience. It treats every visitor (including first-time, anonymous, or lower-income users without digital histories) with the same level of high-quality service.

LOTTE PoC Synergy: Within LOTTE Mart and Cinema, our PoC will focus on "Instant Inclusion"—ensuring that new customers feel immediate "social value" through a personalized journey that doesn't require them to surrender personal data.

3. Environmental (E): Energy-Efficient Inference
The Problem: Heavy AI models contribute significantly to data center energy consumption, a growing concern for retailers aiming for 2040 Carbon Neutrality.

PulseAPI Impact: Our engine is built in Rust, a language known for extreme memory safety and high energy efficiency. Our sub-50ms inference uses significantly less compute power per request compared to legacy Python-based models.

LOTTE PoC Synergy: We will utilize our AWS Activate credits to run the PoC on energy-optimized cloud instances. This allows LOTTE to scale its AI capabilities without a proportional increase in its Scope 3 carbon emissions.

raw_data.product_desc:
We EESCO VN are an Energy Efficiency Start Up, specializing in Chiller Plant Optimization Solution based on Modelling Predictive Control that helps reduce significant energy consumption and CO2 emission for 01 of top 5 global warming contributor: the Cooling Sector.
- Chiller plant is the cooling producer, with up to 40% energy wasting caused by combination of factors: design problem, operation load variation, weather fluctuation and maintenance condition; nominated it as the most improvement potential section that we need to find way to deploy as soon as possible.
- In most of the chiller plant in Vietnam already have automation control system, some new green building has full up-to-date automation system with Energy Management software module but still only can automate the chiller system responding to certain single condition for cutting just a portion of top excess energy (5% - 15% of 40% energy wasting) while don’t do anything with the root cause problem of the system.
- We provide end-to-end optimization controls solution, includes both expert diagnostics, solving the root cause problem, installing hardware with new sensors and controllers at zero downtime, core modelling software on the top, continuous data analyzing and maintenance services for existing cooling & chilling projects, optimize the chiller plant efficiency and maintain its always running at the most efficiency level.
- The optimization controls solution based on Modelling Predictive Control breaks the limitation of traditional automation; help improve efficiency by 10% -. 25% further for the plant that already have good automation system (can be 40% improvement for legacy chiller system) and help chiller increase up to 10% cooling load producing for better handling with peak-load demand challenger. The Modelling Predictive Control Software can predict and automatically select optimal controls strategy, optimal setting, setpoints and control output parameters.
- Beside optimizing energy efficiency, the solution also has capability to optimize based on both cooling load demand and energy cost demand. The additional benefit of the solution is helping reducing water evaporating at cooling tower of chiller system.
The more complex of the system, the more effective of the solution.
We also provide additional products and solutions for further improvement.
- We are confident that we can deliver significant energy efficiency improvement for chiller system at Lotte Dao Tan and Lotte Westlake Hanoi
raw_data.team_background:
We are the unified expert team built on a decade of collaboration & mutual trust.
The combination makes us is the unique founding team defines the local competitive advantages.
-	All founders hold degrees in relevant fields from Hanoi University of Science and Technology. Each handle 01 part of the project and can cross handle for the inhouse strong capability & cost-effective startup.
-	Deep experience with leading firms from Japan, Hong Kong, Singapore; specializing in the design, supply, installation, maintenance, control, optimization of chiller and cooling systems.
-	Extensive professional network connecting key stakeholders across the industry.
-	With 13+ years in chiller plant optimization, 15+ years in sales - development, P&L management, team building, team development, and 20+ years of technical expertise, the founder (formerly was General Manager of BBP Vietnam) holds unmatched expertise in Vietnam’s chiller and cooling system optimizing solution.

Collaboration scope (open to LOTTE affiliate selection):

Track A — LOTTE Mart/Retail: Deploy LandaX's Smart CRM and AI-powered leasing assistant to digitize the commercial space leasing pipeline across LOTTE Mart locations. Expected outcomes: 50%+ reduction in tenant onboarding time, real-time occupancy analytics dashboard, and automated lead qualification for prospective tenants.

Track B — LOTTE Hotel/Hospitality: Integrate LandaX marketplace as a secondary distribution channel for LOTTE Hotel's serviced apartments and resort units, with AI-driven investor matching and automated documentation. Expected outcomes: new revenue stream from secondary market transactions, reduced vacancy rate, enhanced investor experience.

AI assistant handles end-to-end customer inquiries, CRM tracks all touchpoints, and marketplace creates liquidity for institutional and retail investors alike.

raw_data.esg_impact:
LandaX addresses all three pillars of ESG through its digital real estate ecosystem — marketplace, Smart CRM, and AI assistant — and a PoC with LOTTE accelerates measurable impact across each dimension.

Environmental: Vietnam's traditional real estate market relies heavily on physical site visits, paper-based documentation, and repeated in-person meetings to close a single transaction. LandaX digitizes the entire transaction lifecycle — virtual property tours, e-contracts, digital due diligence — helping reduce travel, paper usage, and manual coordination associated with traditional real estate transactions. More importantly, LandaX's AI-powered matching engine optimizes occupancy rates for commercial assets, helping improve occupancy utilization and reduce inefficiencies associated with underutilized commercial assets. A PoC with LOTTE's retail and hospitality portfolio could help establish operational benchmarks related to digital workflows, occupancy utilization, and sustainability reporting.
Social: Commercial real estate investment in Vietnam has historically been accessible only to large institutional players or well-connected individuals. LandaX democratizes access by providing a transparent marketplace and an AI advisor available 24/7 — removing the information asymmetry that disadvantages retail investors and SMEs. LOTTE's customer base of millions of middle-class Vietnamese consumers represents an untapped audience for quality real estate investment opportunities. Through this PoC, LOTTE can create genuine social value by giving its loyal customers access to real estate assets they manage — improving access to transparent investment information for SMEs and middle-income consumers.
Governance: Vietnam's real estate market faces persistent challenges around pricing transparency, legal documentation integrity, and transaction history verification. LandaX standardizes property data, digitizes legal records, and creates a full audit trail for every transaction — reducing fraud risk and legal disputes. LandaX's Smart CRM also enables LOTTE to manage its entire asset portfolio with ESG-aligned data reporting, meeting the growing disclosure requirements from Vietnamese regulators and LOTTE Group's own Korean corporate governance standards. A PoC collaboration provides LOTTE with a tested, scalable framework for ESG-compliant asset management across its Vietnam operations.

Collaboration with ESG, logistics, and operations teams to assess technical standards and scalability potential.

Contributes to lower carbon emissions compared to petroleum-based plastic production.
Encourages sustainable consumption and green supply chain transformation.
Social Impact

Raises consumer awareness about sustainable packaging and responsible consumption.
Supports youth-led climate innovation and green entrepreneurship initiatives in Vietnam.
Governance Impact

Enhances supply chain transparency and sustainable sourcing practices.
Aligns with global sustainability trends and corporate net-zero strategies.
How the PoC with LOTTE Can Accelerate Impact

The collaboration with LOTTE would provide a real-world commercial environment to validate BioWraps’ sustainable packaging solutions at scale. Through LOTTE’s retail and F&B ecosystem, the PoC can generate measurable environmental impact by reducing plastic use, while also improving consumer engagement with green products. In addition, LOTTE’s operational expertise, ESG framework, and regional network would help BioWraps refine product standards, strengthen scalability, and accelerate market adoption across Asia.

raw_data.poc_idea:
Lemit × LOTTE: Low-Carbon Jackfruit Food Innovation for Retail, Foodservice and Sustainable Hospitality

Lemit proposes a 3–6 month PoC with selected LOTTE affiliates to validate how structured young jackfruit ingredients and finished plant-based food applications can be introduced into LOTTE’s ecosystem in Vietnam.

The PoC will focus on three practical collaboration tracks:

1. LOTTE Mart – Retail validation
Lemit will test selected ready-to-cook or ready-to-eat jackfruit-based products such as spring rolls, dumplings, pâté, and frozen meal applications in selected LOTTE Mart locations. The objective is to validate customer acceptance, pricing, shelf performance, repeat purchase, and the potential for a “low-carbon plant-based food” retail corner.

2. LOTTERIA – Menu innovation
Lemit will co-develop one or two jackfruit-based menu concepts for LOTTERIA, such as jackfruit meatball, burger filling, nugget/patty, rice bowl, or blended/hybrid meat application. The objective is to test taste acceptance, kitchen compatibility, preparation time, cost structure, customer trial rate, and social media response.

3. LOTTE Hotel / Hospitality – Sustainable dining experience
Lemit will work with LOTTE Hotel or hospitality-related affiliates to design a “Mekong low-carbon dining” or ESG event menu using young jackfruit-based plant-based dishes. The objective is to validate guest feedback, premium storytelling value, ESG communication, and suitability for corporate events, MICE clients, and international guests.

The proposed PoC will use LOTTE’s retail, F&B, hospitality, customer feedback, and operational infrastructure to test real-world adoption. At the end of the PoC, Lemit and LOTTE can decide whether to expand into additional stores, develop a limited-time LOTTERIA menu, launch a co-branded retail product, or explore B2B ingredient supply and strategic investment.

Expected PoC outcomes:
Validate product-market fit, operational feasibility, consumer acceptance, pricing, ESG storytelling value, and potential scalability across LOTTE Mart, LOTTERIA, LOTTE Hotel, and potentially LOTTE’s wider ecosystem in Vietnam and Korea.
raw_data.esg_impact:
ESG impact addressed by Lemit
Lemit addresses ESG impact by transforming underutilized Mekong young jackfruit into low-carbon plant-based and blended/hybrid meat ingredients. Environmentally, our solution supports meat-reduction pathways, circular use of agricultural biomass, lower food waste, and future product-level carbon measurement through traceability and MRV/LCA.
Socially, Lemit creates new value for local jackfruit farmers and rural supply chains by turning an underused crop into higher-value food ingredients. Lemit currently works with more than 30 farming households and purchases young jackfruit at approximately 20–25% higher than the prevailing market price, helping improve farmer income, create more stable demand, and reduce the risk of agricultural waste.
From a governance perspective, Lemit aims to build a more transparent and measurable supply chain through traceability, food safety standards, ESG data, and responsible sourcing.

How a PoC with LOTTE can help create impact
A PoC collaboration with LOTTE can turn this ESG potential into measurable business evidence. Through LOTTE Mart, LOTTERIA, LOTTE Hotel and/or LOTTE Global Logistics, Lemit can test real customer acceptance, operational feasibility, sustainable menu or retail concepts, and supply-chain traceability in a corporate environment.
If successful, the PoC can create a practical model for low-carbon food innovation in Vietnam: young jackfruit sourced from more than 30 local farming households at fairer prices, processed into structured ingredients, tested through LOTTE’s retail, foodservice and hospitality channels, and potentially scaled into wider B2B supply. This would support LOTTE’s ESG goals by offering healthier, lower-carbon, locally sourced food options while creating rural value and a traceable circular food supply chain.

The proposed PoC includes:

• Supplying and testing premium fresh, frozen, and IQF (Individually Quick Frozen) fruits and vegetables through LOTTE’s retail and distribution channels.

• Developing a farm-to-retail traceability model that connects Vietnamese farmers, cooperatives, processors, and LOTTE’s retail ecosystem to ensure quality, compliance, and transparent sourcing.

• Piloting smart agribusiness solutions, including:

Demand forecasting
Supply chain optimization
Digital procurement workflows
AI-supported sourcing and quality management

• Collaborating with relevant LOTTE affiliates across:

Retail and supermarket distribution
Logistics and cold-chain infrastructure
Food processing and private label development
E-commerce and digital commerce channels

• Conducting market validation for:

Consumer preferences
Packaging concepts
Premium export-oriented product positioning
Sustainable and traceable agricultural products

Expected outcomes within 3–6 months include:

Validation of commercial feasibility
Pilot sales and customer feedback
Supply chain performance assessment
A scalable long-term partnership roadmap between AGRILINK and LOTTE Group

AGRILINK aims to become a strategic long-term agribusiness partner connecting Vietnamese agricultural production with modern retail, technology, and international market opportunities.

2. Social Impact:

3.Governance Impact:

• Building structured procurement and sourcing systems with better compliance and operational visibility.

4. A PoC collaboration with LOTTE could significantly accelerate this impact by:
• Providing access to LOTTE’s retail, logistics, and distribution infrastructure.
• Enabling real-world testing of sustainable agricultural supply chain models.
• Validating consumer demand for traceable and responsibly sourced products.
• Creating scalable partnerships between farmers, processors, AGRILINK, and LOTTE affiliates.
• Demonstrating how technology-driven agribusiness models can support both commercial growth and long-term ESG goals in Vietnam and regional markets.

raw_data.poc_idea:
Proposed PoC idea with LOTTE

Planz by Vitex Vietnam proposes a 3–6 month Proof of Concept (PoC) collaboration with LOTTE Group to digitally transform the event planning, procurement, and operational management process across LOTTE Vietnam and its ecosystem of vendors and partners.

The proposed PoC will focus on the following areas:

Centralized event planning and management platform for internal and external events of LOTTE Vietnam.
Digital workflow for event approval, task management, budgeting, and timeline tracking.
Smart vendor and supplier coordination system, helping LOTTE teams manage quotations, purchasing requests, contracts, and communication with event partners more efficiently.
AI-powered event planning assistant to help generate concepts, timelines, checklists, proposals, and operational documents automatically.
Real-time collaboration between LOTTE departments, agencies, suppliers, and organizers on one unified platform.
Data dashboard and reporting system to monitor event costs, performance, execution status, and vendor efficiency.

The PoC can initially be implemented with selected LOTTE affiliates in Vietnam such as retail, hospitality, shopping malls, marketing activation teams, or corporate internal events.

Expected outcomes within 3–6 months:

Reduce manual operational workload by 40–60%.
Reduce paper-based processes and fragmented communication.
Improve procurement transparency and vendor coordination efficiency.
Standardize event management workflows across LOTTE Vietnam.
Enhance execution speed and operational visibility for management teams.

Vitex Vietnam believes this collaboration can become a scalable digital transformation model for event operations within LOTTE’s ecosystem in Vietnam and potentially other regional markets.
raw_data.esg_impact:
Planz contributes to ESG goals primarily through digital transformation and sustainable operational management.

From an Environmental perspective, our platform significantly reduces paper usage by digitizing event planning documents, approvals, contracts, reports, and operational workflows. By minimizing printed materials and manual administrative processes, LOTTE can reduce waste and improve eco-friendly event operations.

From a Social perspective, Planz improves collaboration and communication among internal teams, suppliers, and partners. The platform helps reduce operational stress, increases productivity, and creates a more transparent and organized working environment for employees and stakeholders.

From a Governance perspective, the platform supports standardized workflows, transparent approval processes, budget tracking, and centralized data management. This helps improve compliance, operational accountability, and management visibility across event-related activities.

A PoC collaboration with LOTTE would help validate and scale these ESG impacts through real operational deployment in Vietnam. By integrating Planz into LOTTE’s event and procurement ecosystem, both parties can jointly build a smarter, more sustainable, and digitally driven operational model for the future.

Our team combines quantitative finance research, AI systems development, product engineering, and lean startup execution. We focus on systematic strategy validation, failure-mode analysis, AI-assisted verification workflows, and rapid iteration around real trader pain points.

Beyond technical execution, the team operates with a strong lean-startup culture: customer pain first, fast experimentation, disciplined product iteration, and long-term team growth alongside product growth.

raw_data.lotte_area: AI/IT(LOTTE Innovate)
raw_data.poc_idea:
We would like to explore a Proof-of-Concept (PoC) collaboration focused on AI-assisted financial verification and risk-awareness infrastructure within LOTTE’s financial, retail-fintech, or digital ecosystem.

Within 3–6 months, AlgoXpert / NEXUS could work with relevant LOTTE affiliates to pilot a lightweight verification workflow that evaluates the robustness and operational risk of AI-generated or systematic financial logic before deployment.

Possible PoC directions include:
- AI-assisted verification workflows for financial or investment-related decision logic
- Internal risk-awareness and simulation tools for quantitative or automated workflows
- Strategy stress-testing under changing market conditions and operational constraints
- Verification dashboards for detecting fragility, instability, or hidden execution risks
- Building explainable “Evidence Cards” for internal review and governance processes

The PoC would focus on demonstrating how verification and trust infrastructure can reduce hidden operational risk and improve decision transparency in AI-assisted financial systems.
raw_data.esg_impact:
AlgoXpert / NEXUS addresses ESG impact primarily through responsible AI usage, financial transparency, and risk-awareness infrastructure.

As AI-generated financial logic becomes increasingly accessible, there is growing risk around opaque decision-making, overfitting, hidden fragility, and uncontrolled automation in financial systems. NEXUS focuses on verification, explainability, and failure detection before capital or operational decisions are exposed to unnecessary risk.

From an ESG perspective, our solution contributes to:
- More transparent and explainable AI-assisted financial processes
- Reduction of hidden systemic and operational risk
- Responsible deployment of AI in financial environments
- Improved governance through evidence-based verification workflows
- Better long-term financial resilience and trust

A collaboration with LOTTE could help validate how verification infrastructure can support safer and more accountable AI adoption within enterprise and financial environments, while also contributing to stronger governance and operational transparency.

raw_data.company_name_vn: CÔNG TY TNHH TƯ VẤN VÀ PHÁT TRIỂN GIÁO DỤC CHI LÊ
raw_data.product_desc: Tomodachi is a voice-first wearable AI buddy for children aged 5–13 — a one-button pendant or watch they talk to every day. It coaches real reasoning with Socratic hint-questions instead of handing over answers, and keeps kids safe with GPS and one-button SOS while parents stay in the loop through everyday chat apps.
raw_data.team_background:
Chi Lê — Founder & Operations
Founder leading operations, with 10+ years scaling EdTech ventures across Vietnam and Southeast Asia. Senior leadership across operations, strategic HR, and quality (Senior Manager at PREP, former COO of IELTS Mastery). PMP®, PgMP®, PMI-ACP®, and CFA Level I, with an LLB in law and the NUS Global HR Leader Program. Fluent in English, Vietnamese, and Chinese.
Giang Minh — Founder & CTO
Backend engineer with 10+ years in low-latency streaming, specializing in WebRTC — the core of the product's real-time voice interaction. Strong in Rust, C/C++, and distributed systems; co-founder of 8xFF, an open-source decentralized network for media servers and IoT. CS degree from Keio University, Japan (full HEDSPI scholarship).
raw_data.traction: Tomodachi is pre-launch, at proof-of-concept stage, so we have no commercial users or signed partners yet. We currently have a working PoC on web and mobile; the wearable device itself has not been built yet — and building that first prototype is the main goal of the round we are currently raising. Our intended launch partners are primary schools and telecom operators in Vietnam, with a 10-school, 1,000-family pilot planned once the prototype is ready.
raw_data.traction_awards: None yet — the company is at an early, proof-of-concept stage. Our key milestone to date is a working proof-of-concept on web and mobile that brings Tomodachi's core concept to life: an AI buddy that builds children's reasoning with Socratic hint-questions instead of handing over answers — and that lets parents keep their child safe and stay quietly informed, without the child ever feeling watched.
raw_data.motivation: Business verification and advancement
raw_data.lotte_area: Retail/Commerce(LOTTE Department Store, LOTTE Mall, LOTTE Mart, etc.), Hospitality/Hotel/Tourism(LOTTE Hotel, LOTTE Properties, LOTTE Cinema, LOTTE World, etc.), AI/IT(LOTTE Innovate)
raw_data.poc_idea: We propose a 3–6 month in-venue child-safety pilot with LOTTE Mart and LOTTE Mall in Vietnam. Children getting separated from their parents is a daily occurrence in large, high-traffic family venues — the exact problem Tomodachi is built to solve. LOTTE would provide one or two pilot sites, access to shopper families, and on-site operational support; Tomodachi would supply a loaner pool of devices and the parent app, giving families real-time in-venue child location, one-button SOS, and instant alerts. Success metrics: fewer lost-child incidents and PA announcements, parent satisfaction (NPS), and family dwell time and repeat visits. The pilot doubles as a retail-distribution test, validating Tomodachi as an in-store family-safety amenity and a potential shelf product for LOTTE Mart. We would phase delivery to our hardware-prototype readiness — pilot design, venue setup and parent onboarding first, device deployment and measurement thereafter.
raw_data.esg_impact: Tomodachi's impact is primarily Social. Child safety: real-time location and one-button SOS reduce the risk of children getting lost or harmed. Healthy development: unlike answer-giving chatbots and addictive apps, Tomodachi coaches reasoning through Socratic hint-questions and enforces healthy-use limits, helping children build critical thinking instead of AI-dependence. Education access: it puts a patient "thinking coach" within reach of families who cannot afford private tutoring. On Governance, Tomodachi is built on responsible-AI-for-children principles — strict child-data protection and "supervision without surveillance," keeping children safe without making them feel watched. (Environmental impact is modest by design: one durable, long-life device rather than several disposable gadgets.) A PoC with LOTTE turns this into measurable impact at scale — piloting in LOTTE's family venues reaches thousands of children and parents directly, converts the safety benefit into hard data, and pairs Tomodachi with a trusted brand to drive responsible, family-friendly adoption.

raw_data.poc_idea:
FUWA proposes a 6-month pilot collaboration with LOTTE Retail, LOTTE Hotel, and LOTTERIA to validate sustainable consumption and circular economy solutions within LOTTE’s ecosystem through a “Green Lifestyle with FUWA” initiative.
Inspired by the Vietnamese lifestyle concept “Nhà sạch thì mát – Bát sạch ngon cơm” (A clean home creates a healthier and happier life), the PoC aims to create engaging sustainability experiences while strengthening LOTTE’s ESG positioning and customer engagement.


Proposed activities:
Green Lifestyle Corner at LOTTE Retail
• Launch FUWA Green Lifestyle Corners at selected LOTTE Mart and LOTTE Mall locations, featuring FUWA refill systems alongside complete eco-friendly product lines.
• Create experiential green-living spaces centered around “Clean Home – Better Living” concepts, helping customers adopt healthier and more sustainable consumption habits.


LOTTERIA Experience Enhancement
• Introduce safe handwashing experiences through FUWA foaming hand wash products in LOTTERIA restroom and wash areas, accompanied by educational handwashing campaigns and visual guidance posters.


• Pilot FUWA eco-enzyme multipurpose cleaning solutions for table cleaning at LOTTERIA locations to ensure effective hygiene without leaving chemical residues on tables and surfaces, improving customer safety and dining experience.
• Provide FUWA deodorizing spray (“Spring Scent”) at selected LOTTERIA stores, allowing customers to remove lingering food odors from clothes after meals and leave with a fresher, more comfortable experience.


LOTTE Hotel & Hospitality
• Pilot eco-enzyme cleaning solutions within LOTTE Hotel facilities to improve employee safety, support green certifications, and strengthen sustainable hospitality practices.


Expected value for LOTTE:
• Strengthen LOTTE’s ESG and sustainability leadership positioning
• Create differentiated customer experiences through green lifestyle initiatives
• Increase customer engagement and loyalty through experiential campaigns
• Generate PR and storytelling opportunities around circular economy innovation and healthy living


KPI targets:
• Reduction in single-use plastic packaging
• Number of refill transactions and customer participation
• Customer engagement and satisfaction levels
• Volume of waste repurposed through circular processes
• Improvement in customer experience and operational performance
Successful validation may support broader integration across LOTTE’s retail, hospitality, and F&B ecosystem.
raw_data.esg_impact:
FUWA addresses key ESG challenges through a circular economy model that transforms agricultural waste into eco-enzyme products while reducing chemical use, plastic waste, and resource consumption.


Environmental impact:
• Repurposes agricultural by-products into high-value bio-based products
• Reduces hazardous chemical usage and environmental pollution
• Promotes refill systems and responsible consumption
• Reduces water consumption through efficient cleaning solutions and sustainable product usage


Social impact:
• Creates safer products for consumers and employees
• Enhances customer safety and improves overall customer experience across LOTTE retail, hospitality, and F&B service points
• Supports local agricultural communities and sustainable livelihoods


Governance impact:
• Promotes transparent sourcing, responsible manufacturing, and ESG-oriented operations


Through a PoC collaboration with LOTTE, FUWA can validate measurable ESG outcomes at a larger scale using real retail and hospitality infrastructure. Beyond environmental impact, the collaboration can create healthier customer experiences, strengthen LOTTE’s sustainability leadership, and accelerate ecosystem-wide adoption of responsible consumption practices.

raw_data.product_desc: Thien Anh Food Trace is a Web3-powered platform that restores consumer trust in Vietnam's food supply chain by providing an immutable, blockchain-backed traceability solution. The platform empowers farms to log verifiable origin data via a B2B SaaS dashboard while engaging urban consumers through a mobile app that offers instant QR verification and incentivizes food safety participation with a unique Token reward system.
raw_data.team_background: With 15 years of professional experience in enterprise IT and a Master’s degree in Applied Mathematics for Data Science and Finance, Thien Anh possesses a rare combination of advanced analytical depth and system architecture expertise. raw_data.poc_idea: For our proposed Proof of Concept (PoC) with LOTTE, Thien Anh Food Trace aims to collaborate with LOTTE Mart Vietnam to launch a 3-to-6-month pilot program that establishes a "Blockchain-Verified Premium Food Corner" in their flagship Ho Chi Minh City supermarkets. Utilizing LOTTE Mart’s existing retail infrastructure and supply chain network, we will integrate our B2B SaaS dashboard with selected high-value organic or export-grade fresh produce suppliers to log immutable harvest and processing data onto the blockchain. On the retail floor, consumers will be able to use our mobile scanning app to instantly verify the food's untampered origin history via encrypted QR codes, while a customized Web3 Token loyalty system will be deployed to incentivize safe-food verification and drive repeat foot traffic back to LOTTE Mart. This collaborative pilot will provide LOTTE with an innovative, data-driven edge in corporate social responsibility (CSR) and brand trust, while proving a scalable commercial blueprint for digital food safety in Vietnam's modern retail sector.
raw_data.esg_impact: Thien Anh Food Trace directly addresses critical ESG parameters by replacing opaque supply chains with an immutable blockchain infrastructure, promoting sustainable agriculture (Environmental), protecting public health through verified food safety (Social), and implementing transparent, tamper-proof digital record-keeping (Governance). A PoC collaboration with LOTTE Mart provides the ideal high-volume ecosystem to amplify this impact. By integrating our platform with LOTTE's retail supply chain, we can empower rural farming cooperatives to adopt eco-friendly farming practices and secure premium market pricing to enhance their livelihoods, while giving millions of urban families verifiable peace of mind and transforming consumer food safety from a policy goal into a measurable daily reality.

Reduce operational inefficiencies in digital retail
Improve access to consumer insights for better customer experience
Enable smarter inventory and promotion planning to reduce waste
Support digital transformation and AI adoption across Southeast Asia’s retail ecosystem

raw_data.poc_idea:
Proposed Proposal for a PoC (Proof of Concept) in Collaboration with LOTTE (within 3-6 months)

Chibi proposes collaboration with LOTTE's subsidiaries to conduct pilot testing (PoC) of pizza and plant-based food products within LOTTE's retail and consumer ecosystem.

Possible collaboration directions include:

Trial distribution of Chibi pizza and plant-based food products at LOTTE Mart supermarkets/stores.

Development of convenient, healthy food, or plant-based food products aligned with modern consumer trends.

Combined marketing, product trials, and customer behavior surveys to assess market expansion potential.

Leveraging LOTTE's logistics infrastructure, cold storage, and retail system to optimize operations and consumer reach.

Research and development of OEM/private label products specifically for the LOTTE ecosystem in the future.

During the Proof of Concept (PoC) phase, Chibi will be responsible for product research, manufacturing, quality control, and supply chain operations; and will collaborate with LOTTE to optimize customer experience and evaluate commercial effectiveness before expanding the partnership long-term.
raw_data.esg_impact:
Chibi’s solution addresses multiple Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) impacts through the development of plant-based and healthier food products.

Environmental Impact:
Chibi focuses on plant-based and natural food products that help reduce dependence on animal-based ingredients, contributing to lower environmental impact and supporting sustainable consumption trends. The company also prioritizes products without preservatives, harmful additives, or artificial coloring, promoting healthier and cleaner food systems.

Social Impact:
Chibi aims to provide consumers with safe, convenient, and healthier food choices while creating stable jobs and a positive working environment for young employees. The company emphasizes employee training, teamwork, and long-term personal development. In addition, Chibi actively promotes a healthier lifestyle and community-oriented values through its products and business culture.

Governance Impact:
Chibi is building a transparent and professionally managed organization with clear operational structures across production, quality control, logistics, sales, and administration. The company operates under food safety standards and continuously improves internal systems to support sustainable growth.

A PoC collaboration with LOTTE could significantly amplify these ESG impacts by leveraging LOTTE’s retail ecosystem, logistics infrastructure, and customer network. Through pilot distribution programs, customer testing, and co-development opportunities, the partnership could help accelerate access to healthier plant-based food products for a wider consumer market, while also strengthening sustainable food innovation in Vietnam and potentially across regional markets.

raw_data.lotte_area: Retail/Commerce(LOTTE Department Store, LOTTE Mall, LOTTE Mart, etc.)
raw_data.poc_idea:
1. LOTTE Mart (Kênh Siêu thị)
Tên dự án: Thử nghiệm "Góc Xanh Bản Địa" & Tối ưu Sản phẩm Nông nghiệp Sinh thái

Thời gian triển khai: 3 tháng.

Hạ tầng & Tài nguyên sử dụng: Không gian quầy kệ tại các trung tâm siêu thị lớn, hệ thống logistics chuỗi cung ứng lạnh (cold-chain), và dữ liệu hành vi mua sắm tại quầy (POS).

Kịch bản triển khai:

Tháng 1: Khảo sát và lựa chọn 2-3 điểm siêu thị LOTTE Mart có lượng khách hàng quan tâm đến sức khỏe cao. Thiết kế và lắp đặt khu vực trưng bày riêng biệt (Eco-corner) cho các sản phẩm nông nghiệp sinh thái, thực phẩm organic chất lượng cao (như các dòng sản phẩm dẻo bùi từ gạo ruộng rươi, đồ khô cao cấp).

Tháng 2: Tích hợp sản phẩm vào chuỗi logistics ngắn của LOTTE Mart để tối ưu thời gian vận chuyển từ vùng nguyên liệu đến quầy kệ. Bắt đầu chiến dịch dùng thử sản phẩm ngay tại siêu thị để thu thập phản hồi trực tiếp từ người tiêu dùng.

Tháng 3: Vận hành thương mại thử nghiệm. Sử dụng dữ liệu POS của LOTTE Mart để phân tích sức mua, tần suất mua lại và biên lợi nhuận, từ đó đánh giá tính khả thi trước khi nhân rộng ra toàn bộ hệ thống siêu thị.

2. LOTTE Department Store (Kênh Trung tâm Thương mại Cao cấp)
Tên dự án: Chuỗi Pop-up Store "Quà Tặng Tử Tế" & Trải nghiệm Ẩm thực Bản địa Cao cấp

Thời gian triển khai: 3–4 tháng.

Hạ tầng & Tài nguyên sử dụng: Khu vực sảnh sự kiện/Pop-up cao cấp, kênh truyền thông nội bộ (Mobile App, thẻ thành viên L.POINT), và tệp khách hàng VIP của LOTTE Department Store.

Kịch bản triển khai:

Tháng 1–2: Thiết kế không gian trải nghiệm Pop-up mang phong cách tối giản, sang trọng, kể lại câu chuyện văn hóa bản địa (ví dụ: hành trình từ đồng ruộng sinh thái đến bàn ăn hiện đại). Chuẩn bị các bộ hộp quà tặng cao cấp, tinh tế (kết hợp các món đặc sản vùng miền đạt chuẩn OCOP, bánh tẻ vị xưa, chè bưởi cốt dừa, thạch đen thủy cẩm thượng hạng).

Tháng 3: Ra mắt gian hàng Pop-up độc quyền tại LOTTE Department Store vào dịp lễ hoặc mùa mua sắm cao điểm. Tổ chức các buổi workshop nhỏ về "Lối sống xanh - Ăn sạch" dành riêng cho tệp khách hàng VIP của trung tâm thương mại.

Tháng 4: Đo lường hiệu quả chuyển đổi từ chiến dịch truyền thông nội bộ của LOTTE (như gửi thông báo qua App tới tập khách hàng mục tiêu) và đánh giá mức độ sẵn sàng chi trả của phân khúc khách hàng cao cấp đối với các sản phẩm quà tặng sinh thái.

3. LOTTE Mall (Kênh Tổ hợp Mua sắm & Giải trí)
Tên dự án: Chiến dịch Ngày hội Gia đình "Green Weekend" & Trạm Trải nghiệm Lối sống Xanh

Thời gian triển khai: 4–6 tháng.

Hạ tầng & Tài nguyên sử dụng: Không gian quảng trường/khu vực sinh hoạt cộng đồng tại LOTTE Mall (phù hợp cho các gia đình trẻ), và hệ thống màn hình LED/kênh truyền thông số tại tổ hợp.

Kịch bản triển khai:

Tháng 1–2: Lên ý tưởng và phối hợp với ban quản lý LOTTE Mall để xây dựng chuỗi sự kiện cuối tuần "Green Weekend" hướng tới đối tượng gia đình trẻ và giới trẻ hiện đại – những người quan tâm đến xu hướng eat-clean và bảo vệ môi trường.

Tháng 3–4: Triển khai các trạm trải nghiệm thực tế tại LOTTE Mall:

Trạm Dinh dưỡng: Thử nghiệm trực tiếp các món ăn giải nhiệt mùa hè, phân biệt các dòng gạo lứt (gạo lứt trắng eat-clean, gạo lứt tím thảo dược dưỡng nhan) để giáo dục thị trường.

Trạm Sống xanh: Các hoạt động tương tác, trò chơi giáo dục cho trẻ em về nông nghiệp sinh thái, bảo vệ đa dạng sinh học.

Tháng 5–6: Đánh giá lượng traffic (lượt khách tham quan) đổ về sự kiện và hiệu quả thúc đẩy doanh số của các gian hàng vệ tinh bên trong LOTTE Mall có liên kết với chương trình.

Tiêu chí cốt lõi để đánh giá thành công sau 3-6 tháng:
Khả năng tương thích hạ tầng: Sản phẩm và quy trình vận hành đáp ứng đầy đủ các tiêu chuẩn kiểm định nghiêm ngặt về chất lượng, hóa đơn, và logistics của hệ thống bán lẻ LOTTE.

Mức độ thấu hiểu khách hàng: Tận dụng tối đa bộ lọc dữ liệu và hành vi mua sắm của LOTTE để định hình lại bao bì, dung tích và giá bán phù hợp nhất với thói quen tiêu dùng của người miền Bắc.

Giá trị cộng hưởng: Rueco mang lại câu chuyện thương hiệu sinh thái "Good - Clean - Fair" độc đáo giúp làm phong phú thêm hình ảnh phát triển bền vững (ESG) của tập đoàn LOTTE, đi lại việc tiếp cận nhanh chóng vào hệ sinh thái bán lẻ hàng đầu.
raw_data.esg_impact:
Giải pháp của chúng tôi — khởi nguồn từ nông nghiệp tái sinh (đặc biệt là hệ sinh thái lúa ruộng rươi), nguồn cung ứng bền vững và bảo tồn sinh kế địa phương — hoàn toàn trùng khớp với các trụ cột cốt lõi của tiêu chuẩn ESG (Môi trường, Xã hội và Quản trị).

Bằng cách thực hiện một dự án thử nghiệm (PoC) trong hệ thống hạ tầng bán lẻ của LOTTE Mart, LOTTE Department Store và LOTTE Mall, chúng tôi có thể chuyển hóa các tác động lý thuyết này thành những cột mốc bán lẻ thực tế, có thể đo lường và mở rộng quy mô.

1. Tác động Môi trường (Environmental - E)
Tác động ESG chúng tôi giải quyết:
Bảo tồn đa dạng sinh học & Sức khỏe đất: Hệ sinh thái sản phẩm của chúng tôi dựa trên canh tác sinh thái, hoàn toàn không hóa chất. Ví dụ, gạo của RuEco được thu hoạch từ các ruộng rươi đặc thù — một hệ sinh thái tự nhiên bắt buộc không sử dụng phân bón hóa học, thuốc trừ sâu hay thuốc diệt cỏ. Nhờ đó giúp bảo tồn đa dạng sinh học bản địa, thúc đẩy tích tụ carbon trong đất và bảo vệ nguồn nước ngầm trong khu vực.

Giảm thiểu rác thải theo triết lý "Slow Food": Kiên định với triết lý Good – Clean – Fair (Ngon – Sạch – Công bằng), chúng tôi ưu tiên quy trình chế biến sạch, tối giản thay vì lạm dụng các biện pháp công nghiệp hóa chất để kéo dài hạn sử dụng, từ đó giảm thiểu dấu chân carbon và lượng chất thải độc hại ra môi trường.

Hợp tác PoC với LOTTE giúp thúc đẩy tác động này như thế nào:
Thử nghiệm và tối ưu Chuỗi Logistics Xanh (LOTTE Mart): Vận hành chuỗi cung ứng lạnh và quản lý hạn sử dụng ngắn của các sản phẩm tươi, không chất bảo quản (như Thạch Thủy Cẩm vùng cao hay các loại bánh truyền thống) là một thách thức rất lớn. Một dự án PoC kéo dài 3 tháng tận dụng mạng lưới chuỗi cung ứng lạnh sẵn có của LOTTE Mart sẽ giúp chúng tôi tối ưu hóa bao bì sinh học, rút ngắn thời gian vận chuyển, giảm thiểu hao hụt thực phẩm và chứng minh rằng: Mô hình logistics sạch, không chất bảo quản hoàn toàn có thể vận hành hiệu quả ở quy mô lớn.

2. Tác động Xã hội (Social - S)
Tác động ESG chúng tôi giải quyết:
Thương mại công bằng & Sinh kế nông thôn: Các hộ nông dân nhỏ lẻ và các hợp tác xã địa phương (như HTX Ba Khía Đầm Dơi tại Cà Mau hay đồng bào bám rừng tại Cao Bằng) thường chịu tổn thương do biến động giá cả thị trường và bị ép giá. Chúng tôi cam kết bao tiêu với mức giá thu mua công bằng, mang lại sự ổn định tài chính và bảo tồn các giá trị di sản vùng miền.

Sức khỏe người tiêu dùng & Giáo dục dinh dưỡng: Chúng tôi chủ động định hình lại thói quen tiêu dùng, giảm phụ thuộc vào thực phẩm siêu chế biến bằng cách cung cấp các giải pháp thay thế giàu dinh dưỡng, minh bạch (như gạo lứt trắng eat-clean chỉ số đường huyết thấp, gạo lứt tím thảo dược giàu anthocyanin chống lão hóa và các món ăn nhẹ sạch lành).

Hợp tác PoC với LOTTE giúp thúc đẩy tác động này như thế nào:
Nâng tầm nhận thức thị trường & Kết nối công bằng (LOTTE Mall): Thông qua việc tổ chức các ngày hội gia đình "Green Weekend" hoặc các trạm trải nghiệm tương tác bên trong LOTTE Mall, chúng tôi có thể "bình dân hóa" và giáo dục khái niệm đặc sản vùng miền đến tệp khách hàng đô thị. Khi người tiêu dùng đại chúng hiểu được tại sao gạo lứt tím không hóa chất hay các sản phẩm từ rừng ngập mặn lại có giá trị cao, họ sẽ sẵn sàng chi trả. Cầu thị trường bền vững này sẽ trực tiếp chuyển hóa thành doanh thu bền vững chảy ngược về các HTX nông thôn.

Tôn vinh giá trị di sản bản địa (LOTTE Department Store): Việc đưa các sản phẩm thực phẩm truyền thống, đóng gói bao bì sạch, tinh tế thành các bộ hộp quà tặng cao cấp xuất hiện tại Pop-up của LOTTE Department Store sẽ thay đổi hoàn toàn định kiến của người tiêu dùng. Nó chứng minh rằng nông nghiệp bền vững bản địa không hề "mộc mạc, thô sơ" mà là một sự lựa chọn cao cấp, thể hiện trách nhiệm xã hội, rất xứng đáng xuất hiện trong giỏ quà tặng doanh nghiệp và lễ Tết hiện đại.

3. Tác động Quản trị (Governance - G)
Tác động ESG chúng tôi giải quyết:
Truy xuất nguồn gốc & Chuỗi cung ứng minh bạch: Chúng tôi xóa bỏ ranh giới mập mờ giữa trang trại và bàn ăn. Tất cả sản phẩm đều sở hữu chứng nhận khắt khe của địa phương (như chứng nhận OCOP, chứng nhận ATVTP), đảm bảo mọi công đoạn sản xuất đều được ghi chép, có thể kiểm toán và tuân thủ nghiêm ngặt các kỳ vọng về lao động công bằng.

Hợp tác PoC với LOTTE giúp thúc đẩy tác động này như thế nào:
Chuẩn hóa năng lực quản trị theo tiêu chuẩn tập đoàn: Các tập đoàn bán lẻ lớn như LOTTE Group luôn áp dụng những quy trình kiểm duyệt nhà cung cấp, quản trị kho vận và kiểm soát chất lượng nghiêm ngặt bậc nhất châu Á. Việc đồng thiết kế một dự án PoC từ 3-6 tháng buộc chuỗi cung ứng của chúng tôi phải tích hợp sâu hệ thống dữ liệu mã vạch, quản lý POS và các cơ chế tuân thủ của LOTTE. Sự hợp tác này sẽ tạo ra một "bản khuôn mẫu" quản trị hoàn hảo, chứng minh cách các thương hiệu sinh thái quy mô nhỏ có thể thích ứng và đồng điệu hoàn toàn với các tiêu chuẩn quản trị doanh nghiệp đa quốc gia.

Tóm lại
Giải pháp của chúng tôi mang đến cho LOTTE một câu chuyện "Good – Clean – Fair" đầy tính bản địa, chân thực và trực quan để hiện thực hóa các cam kết ESG của tập đoàn. Đổi lại, một dự án PoC thương mại được đo ni đóng giày trên các kênh bán lẻ cốt lõi của LOTTE sẽ cung cấp cho mạng lưới nông nghiệp sinh thái của chúng tôi nền tảng dữ liệu, hạ tầng logistics và cơ hội tiếp cận khách hàng tối quý để biến nông nghiệp bền vững thành một thực thể kinh doanh có lợi nhuận ổn định.

raw_data.product_desc: Nguyen Khoi provides premium, traceable pork and value-added food products produced through animal welfare and circular farming practices. We help hospitality, retail, and food service partners create distinctive customer experiences while advancing their sustainability goals.
raw_data.team_background:
Our founding team combines complementary strengths in entrepreneurship, sustainability, business development, and operational execution.

Nguyen Luong Quyet (Founder & CEO) brings expertise in project management, operations, and business building. Nguyen Phuong Thao (Co-founder & COO) holds an MSc in Environmental Sciences from the University of East Anglia (UK) and leads strategy, partnerships, fundraising, and business development.

What sets us apart is strong leadership, ownership, and the courage to challenge the status quo. Neither founder came from a traditional livestock background, yet we entered the industry with a vision to build a better food system and committed ourselves to making it a reality.

Over the past seven years, we transformed Nguyen Khoi from an idea into a trusted premium food brand serving leading restaurants, hotels, international schools, and retailers across Vietnam. Our model has been recognized through awards and support from organizations including the World Bank, Aus4Innovation, UNDP, and the Royal Academy of Engineering (UK).

Our core competencies include systems thinking, innovation, partnership development, resilience, and the ability to turn complex sustainability challenges into scalable business solutions.
raw_data.traction:
• Distribution through 23 stores across 17 premium food retail brands in Vietnam.

• Paying customers across B2B and B2C channels, including restaurants, hotels, international schools, retailers, and health-conscious consumers.

• Key clients include Fairmont Hanoi, Sheraton Saigon, Pizza 4P’s, Sol Pizza, Dewey Schools, Ecofoods, and Xanh Sam.

• Approximately 90% of business customers continue partnerships beyond their first year, and over 90% of new customers come through referrals.

• Key partners include Humane World for Animals, Vietnam Japan University, VCIC (World Bank & Ministry of Science and Technology), Aus4Innovation, and Eurofins.
raw_data.traction_awards:
1. Awards and Grants

• Winner, Blue Swallow Award for Pioneering Sustainable Agriculture (VCCI, UNDP, CSIP), 2019.

• Third Prize, VietFarm Award – Pride of Vietnam (CDI & Irish Aid), 2019.

• Winner, Entrepreneurship Challenge (WISE Vietnam & U.S. Embassy), 2023.

• Top 10 Innovations, Towards Zero Waste Accelerator (GIZ), 2025.
raw_data.motivation: Joint commercialization linkage with LOTTE Group affiliates

raw_data.poc_idea:
We propose a 3–6 month Proof of Concept with LOTTE Hotels and LOTTE Hospitality businesses to develop a sustainable premium pork supply chain based on Nguyen Khoi’s Circular Happiness Farming model.

The project would involve supplying premium pork products produced under circular farming and animal welfare standards to selected LOTTE hospitality outlets, while jointly evaluating product quality, customer acceptance, operational feasibility, and sustainability performance.

Key objectives include:

• Testing demand for premium, traceable, and responsibly produced pork products.

• Demonstrating the feasibility of integrating sustainable sourcing into LOTTE’s hospitality operations.

• Measuring business, customer, and sustainability outcomes.

The PoC aims to establish a replicable model for sustainable food sourcing that can be expanded across LOTTE’s hospitality and retail ecosystem in Vietnam.
raw_data.esg_impact:
Nguyen Khoi addresses key Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) challenges in the livestock and food supply chain.

- Environmental: Our Circular Happiness Farming model reduces waste, prevents livestock wastewater discharge, improves resource efficiency through probiotics, bio-bedding, and biogas systems, and reduces greenhouse gas emissions through circular resource management.

- Social: We promote higher animal welfare standards, food safety, transparent sourcing, and sustainable livelihoods through responsible farming practices.

- Governance:We operate with traceability, quality assurance, and internationally recognized food safety standards, helping build trust across the supply chain.

A PoC collaboration with LOTTE could demonstrate how sustainable sourcing can be integrated into hospitality and retail operations while generating measurable ESG outcomes. Together, we could pilot premium pork products produced under circular farming and animal welfare standards, providing LOTTE with a practical model to strengthen responsible sourcing, reduce supply-chain impacts, and meet growing consumer demand for sustainable food.

raw_data.product_desc: Volterra is an end-to-end SaaS platform for EV charging infrastructure developers and operators in Vietnam who face high electricity costs, long payback periods, and scaling challenges. By combining Digital Twin technology, AI optimization, and Dynamic Load Management, Volterra integrates renewable energy (solar, wind) and battery energy storage (BESS) into charging operations.
raw_data.team_background: We have our research backed by research team from VinUniversity, with Founder & President Laurent, who has PhD Degree from Stanford University, also top 0.14% most cited AI researcher globally, and an expert in AI Optimization. Our Co-founder & CEO To Lang has 10+ years experience in Smart City, AI, Big Data, and Robotics Industries. Our Co-founder & CPO Nguyen Phi Long is a Doctor in Engineering and an expert in Electricity & Grid Infrastructure with15+ years experience.
raw_data.traction: We have secured 2 first contracts with 2 charging operators (3-4B VND total value). Our key client in the future is V-Green, the largest charging developer in Vietnam with more than 90% market share. We also target individual charging investors throughout Vietnam, who wants to maximize ROI of their charging stations with our enhanced solutions. We partner with VinUniversity, VinFast, EDF, PECC2, UC Berkeley, etc for our data training and research development.
raw_data.traction_awards:
1. Volterra won 1st runner up at Techfest 2025 – National largest competition for Tech Startups
Volterra is proud to have been awarded 1st Runner-Up at Techfest Vietnam 2025, the country’s largest national innovation and startup festival organized by the Ministry of Science and Technology, selected from a highly competitive pool of startups. During Techfest, Volterra not only competed in the National Innovative Technopreneur Contest but also showcased its technology at the exhibition zone, engaging with investors, industry leaders, policymakers, and the public. This achievement reflects strong validation of Volterra’s technological innovation, real-world impact, and alignment with Vietnam’s green growth and Net Zero 2050 goals.

2. Volterra won First Prize in Sustainability Category by Stanford Doerr School of Sustainability x HKUST
The Global Sustainability Challenge is an annual international competition that brings together scientific research, applied technology, and innovation to address pressing sustainability challenges worldwide. Volterra competed in the Asia-Pacific regional finals at Zhejiang University in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, China. We won the 1st prize in competition with 60+ teams from China, Singapore, Hongkong, etc. Winning First Prize at the Global Sustainability Challenge represents Volterra’s first major international validation of its research-driven approach.

3. Volterra was among ‘Best Start-up’ by Block71 x National University of Singapore (NUS) x Golden Gate Ventures (GGV)
UniVentures 2025 is a structured incubation program designed to nurture early-stage startups founded by university students, alumni, and researchers. The Top 10 startups were officially announced on January 29, 2026, in Ho Chi Minh City, following a nationwide selection process. We were among ‘Best Teams’ prize by GGV, eligible for $25,000 prize, a 3-month Incubation, and next round of investments.

raw_data.poc_idea: We aim to collaborate with LOTTE Group affiliates such as LOTTE Department Store, LOTTE Mall, LOTTE Mart, LOTTE Hotel, LOTTE Properties, LOTTE Cinema, LOTTE World, and others, to integrate our energy management and optimization software into their EV charging infrastructure as well as their broader energy and electricity management systems.
raw_data.esg_impact:
1. Environmental Impact
We aim to significantly reduce CO₂ emissions by accelerating the adoption of electric vehicles (EVs) in Vietnam. Currently, approximately 60% of total CO₂ emissions in Vietnam come from electricity & heat generation and the transportation sector, which poses a major challenge to achieving the country’s Net Zero 2050 commitment.

Beyond emissions, Vietnam is also facing a macro-level energy challenge - electricity shortages and rising energy costs. According to the World Bank, around 3.5 million people in Vietnam are affected by electricity shortages annually, resulting in approximately $32 million in additional electricity costs each year. This has a direct negative impact on both economic activity and quality of life.

Volterra addresses these challenges by optimizing energy consumption and electricity costs for EV charging operators through our smart energy management and optimization platform. By improving efficiency at the infrastructure level, we create a systematic positive impact across the entire ecosystem, from operators to EV users, and ultimately to the broader community.

2. Social Impact
Our solution contributes to improving energy accessibility and affordability, while enabling a smoother transition toward sustainable mobility. By reducing the strain on the national power grid and lowering operational costs, we help make EV adoption more practical and accessible for a wider population.

3. Role of PoC Collaboration with LOTTE
A Proof of Concept (PoC) with LOTTE affiliates (such as malls, hotels, and commercial properties) would allow us to:
- Deploy and validate our energy optimization platform at scale within high-traffic, energy-intensive environments
- Reduce energy consumption, peak load pressure, and electricity costs across LOTTE’s properties
- Integrate EV charging infrastructure with smart energy management systems, creating a model for sustainable commercial real estate
- Demonstrate measurable CO₂ reduction and operational efficiency improvements, which can be scaled across LOTTE’s ecosystem and beyond

Through this collaboration, LOTTE can become a leading example of sustainable infrastructure transformation in Vietnam, while Volterra delivers measurable ESG impact aligned with both corporate sustainability goals and Vietnam's Net Zero 2050 Mission.

raw_data.poc_idea:
Proposed PoC: Natural Functional Beverage Market Validation through LOTTE Ecosystem.
Hoang Mai proposes a 3–6 month Proof of Concept (PoC) with LOTTE Group affiliates, particularly LOTTE Mart Vietnam and LOTTE Hotels & Resorts, to validate market demand for our 100% natural functional beverages made from farm-grown ingredients such as ginger, lemongrass, lemon, and basil seeds.
The project would include:
Pilot sales and product placement in selected LOTTE Mart stores.
Consumer sampling and feedback collection to assess product-market fit.
Testing as a healthy beverage option in LOTTE Hotels, cafés, and food service channels.
Joint marketing activities highlighting sustainable sourcing, organic agriculture, and wellness-focused products.
Analysis of customer purchasing behavior and optimization of product packaging, pricing, and branding.
Expected outcomes include validating consumer demand, generating sales data, refining the product offering, and establishing a scalable distribution model through LOTTE’s retail and hospitality ecosystem. The PoC will also explore opportunities for long-term commercial partnerships and regional market expansion.
raw_data.esg_impact:
Hoang Mai’s solution addresses several key ESG challenges through sustainable agriculture, healthy food production, and responsible supply chain management.
Environmental: Our beverages are made from 100% natural ingredients sourced from our farm, reducing the use of synthetic chemicals and promoting biodiversity. We prioritize sustainable farming practices and local sourcing to minimize environmental impact and transportation emissions.
Social: We create stable income opportunities for local farmers and rural communities by building a transparent farm-to-consumer value chain. Our products also support consumer well-being by offering healthy, natural beverage alternatives with no artificial ingredients.
Governance: We are committed to product traceability, food safety, ethical sourcing, and transparent business practices. Our operations emphasize quality control and responsible management throughout the supply chain.
A PoC collaboration with LOTTE could significantly amplify this impact by introducing sustainable and health-focused products to a larger consumer base through LOTTE Mart and LOTTE’s hospitality ecosystem. The collaboration would help validate consumer demand, increase market access for responsibly sourced products, support local farming communities, and demonstrate a scalable model for sustainable consumption in Vietnam and beyond.
